Term Sheet: Strategic Convertible Debenture Financing for Thaloma Nexus Public Company Limited (Thailand)
Parties: Issuer — Thaloma Nexus Public Company Limited (listed on the Stock Exchange of Thailand); Investor — Anurak Meridian Capital Co., Ltd.; Thai counsel — Rattana & Pine Legal Advisors
Instrument/Size: THB 480,000,000 unsecured convertible debentures, 3-year tenor, coupon 5.25% p.a., conversion price to be set per SEC Thailand regulation upon filing
Use of Proceeds: data center expansion and working capital; no proceeds to be used for share buybacks during MNPI blackout
Conditions Precedent: SEC Thailand approval for offering; SET immediate disclosure; internal compliance memo “TH-SEA-PDPA Memo 2026-05-18” confirming MNPI handling and PDPA alignment
MNPI/Confidentiality: Parties acknowledge receipt of the insider list and undertake no selective disclosure; trading blackout applies until the SET notice is posted and any Form 246-2 obligations are satisfied
Data Protection (PDPA): Annex A DPA Schedule (Processor Onboarding Form) to be executed with each processor; data minimisation applies to investor onboarding, collecting only business contact details and role titles
Cross-Border Transfer: Annex B Data-Export Approval Ref DE-TH-2026-011 permits transfer of limited contact data to investor systems hosted in Singapore under intra-group transfer clauses referencing PDPA Section 28; ad-hoc exports to non-adequate locations were discontinued on 1 May 2026
Consent/Withdrawal: Marketing emails related to the offering will use opt-in consent with a functional withdrawal link; as of signing, no pending consent withdrawal requests remain
DSAR/Erasure/Retention: Issuer to respond to DSARs within 30 days; HR applicant CVs retained 90 days, investor KYC records 7 years, followed by erasure; there is no DSAR backlog or unresolved erasure order as certified in Compliance Memo TH-PDPA-ATT-02
Employment Matters: Key employee retention pool of THB 22,000,000 subject to board approval; Annex C HR Processor DPA covers payroll and benefits; no biometric templates or national ID numbers will be collected under this term sheet, and the related fields on onboarding forms were disabled on 15 May 2026
Security/IT Controls: No unencrypted PII will be exported; historic spreadsheets containing candidate phone numbers were purged on 2 April 2026 per Record of Processing retention schedule
Conditions Subsequent: Post-closing SET filing within T+1 business day and SEC confirmation of allotment; quarterly covenant certificate to confirm compliance with SEA and PDPA obligations, including cross-border logs and minimisation checks
Representations: Each party confirms it is not in possession of undisclosed information that would reasonably be expected to materially affect the price of the Issuer’s securities, other than information permitted to be shared under a confidentiality agreement
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Kingdom of Thailand law; disputes to be resolved by the Civil Court of Bangkok; Thai language version to prevail if translated
Contacts: Lead contact Ms. Kanya Boonprasert, Company Secretary, email kanya.boonprasert@thaloma.example; DPO: dpo@thaloma.example; Investor contact Khun Pravit Suksan, email dealdesk@anurak-meridian.example
